title: christella papilio
intro: Christella papilio, also known as the butterfly fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, headaches, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Christella papilio include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve liver function, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Christella papilio is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can be found in various forms, including dried leaves and extracts, which are used to make tinctures and capsules.
